SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Set For Trial On May-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 210

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Continued To May-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS IN PRO PER - RACHEL DURLING AND ELIA GILBERT
DEFENDANT/APPELANT IN PRO PER - ANTHONY IMPERIAL, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR FOR NEXTARTS

PARTIES ARE SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS 1-4 AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT 1 ARE MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

AFTER TESTIMONY BY BOTH SIDES A SETTLEMENT IS REACHED AD FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT/APPELLANT ANTHONY IMPERIAL SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF RACHEL DURLING THE SUM OF $565.50, AND SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF ELIA GILBERT THE SUM OF $524.00 FORTHWITH. COURT TO ENTER DISMISSAL ON JUNE 11, 2008 IF NO FURTHER ACTION IS REQUIRED IN THIS MATTER.

JUDGE DAVID BALLATTI; CLERK NICOLE DAVIS; NOT REPORTED.
